publishedAbstract: A customer is trying to use the ceph tools pod to mount an rbd volume and run fsck on a failed pod/pv/pvc, but is receiving a "Operation not permitted"error. ~~~ $ rbd map ocs-storagecluster-cephblockpool/csi-vol-xxx-xxxx-xxxx rbd: failed to set udev buffer size: (1) Operation not permitted ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF: Can't mount RBD image within Ceph Tools Pod deployed by ODF because of wrong permissions.
